headline: Birds
description: Birds (class Aves) are feathered, warm-blooded vertebrates descended from theropod dinosaurs. ~11,000 species. Key adaptations: feathers (flight + insulation), hollow bones (lightweight), beak (no teeth, lightweight), highly efficient respiratory system, wings (modified forelimbs). Migration: Arctic Tern — 90,000 km annually (longest migration).

citation.name: The Sibley Guide to Birds (2nd Ed)
